field_description: Type of the data package (Yoda: Data_Type)
Name of the data collection this package belongs to (max 255 chars) (Yoda: Collection_Name)
Date when the embargo on this data package ends (Yoda: Embargo_End_Date)
Data package creators, one per line: "FirstName LastName" (Yoda: Creator.Name)
Affiliations corresponding to each creator, one per line (Yoda: Creator.Affiliation)
Persistent identifiers for creators, one per line: "ORCID: 0000-0001-2345-6789" (Yoda: Creator.Person_Identifier)

Contributors with role, one per line: "FirstName LastName (Role)". Roles: ContactPerson, DataCollector, DataCurator, DataManager, Distributor, Editor, Funder, HostingInstitution, Producer, ProjectLeader, ProjectManager, ProjectMember, RegistrationAgency, RegistrationAuthority, RelatedPerson, Researcher, ResearchGroup, RightsHolder, Sponsor, Supervisor, WorkPackageLeader, Other (Yoda: Contributor)
Affiliations corresponding to each contributor, one per line (Yoda: Contributor.Affiliation)
Persistent identifiers for contributors, one per line: "ORCID: 0000-0001-2345-6789" (Yoda: Contributor.Person_Identifier)
Funding organizations, one per line (Yoda: Funding_Reference.Funder_Name)
Grant/award numbers corresponding to each funder, one per line (Yoda: Funding_Reference.Award_Number)
